text:
marcus      2007-10-24 06:15:14 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/pam_ldap    Makefile distinfo 
  Log:
  Update to 1.8.4.
  
  fix for BUG#291:
  don't suppress password policy errors which should not be suppressed
  
  fix for BUG#312:
  pam_ldap does not try to reconnect when LDAP server closed the connection
  
  PR:             116176
  Submitted by:   mm
